name: info-audit
description: You are an expert AI developer helping to build the "Omni-Auditor." This project is an autonomous agent that takes an Instagram username, extracts their bio link, analyzes their website for conversion drops using Firecrawl, watches their latest 3-5 IG posts via Apify, and generates a unified business improvement pitch using LLMs (Gemini). Our Current Goal: We are currently executing Phase 1: Data Extraction. We are NOT building the UI or the AI integration yet. We are writing a pure Node.js CLI script to ensure our extraction pipeline (Apify + Firecrawl) works reliably. 🛠️ Tech Stack & Dependencies Environment: Node.js (ES Modules enabled via "type": "module" in package.json). Instagram Scraper: apify-client (Using the official apify/instagram-scraper actor). Website Scraper: @mendable/firecrawl-js (Firecrawl API for converting web pages to LLM-ready Markdown). Environment Variables: dotenv Required .env variables: code Env APIFY_API_TOKEN=your_apify_token_here FIRECRAWL_API_KEY=your_firecrawl_key_here 🗄️ Expected Data Payload (Target Output for Phase 1) The script must successfully output a JSON object structured exactly like this: code JSON {   "social": {     "username": "target_username",     "followers": 150000,     "latest_posts": [       {         "url": "https://instagram.com/p/...",         "type": "Video",         "videoUrl": "https://scontent...mp4",         "caption": "Video caption here...",         "views": 50000,         "likes": 1200       }     ]   },   "website": {     "url": "https://target-bio-link.com",     "content": "# Extracted Markdown from Firecrawl..."   } }
